$ cargo build
   Compiling zextract v0.1.0
error[E0382]: borrow of moved value: `foo`
  --> src/extract.rs:42:8
   |
40 |     let foo = items;
   |         --- move occurs because `foo` has type `Vec<String>`
41 |     consume(foo);
   |             --- value moved here
42 |     use(&foo);
   |         ^^^^ value borrowed here after move

  --> crates/zextract/src/main.rs:142:9
   |
142 |     let bar = compute();
   |         ^^^ help: consider prefixing with an underscore: `_bar`
